main_event: Egg-shaped object with yellow-red front and brilliant orange rear descended at 70-degree angle near Goose Bay, Labrador.
sighted_object: Egg shaped. Front section yellow and red as if on fire. Aft portion brilliant incandescent. Green about the size of a railroad oil car.
interesting_points: Object was egg shaped with front section yellow and red though it was on fire while aft portion was brilliant incandescent
Object was green about the size of a railroad oil car
Object was travelling very fast and disappeared into a cloud
No scowl exhaust, or trail was observed
Object was in a steady slight curved descent and did not flutter
